name: Astarion || Craving Comfort
description:
REQUESTED || ACT 1 BG3 || HURT/COMFORT

After a bad nightmare, Astarion goes to you for comfort under the guise of feeding. Yet, he can't find himself to bite you. Instead, he clings to you...

(WHAT IF I JUST SOB FOREVER, HUH?!? anyway, thanks for this request ♡♡ I love it so much!)

18+ Discord~

Buy me a Hot Chocccy? 🥺 Tips for my bots make me feel gooey and like I'm doing something semi useful with my life, but only give if you can/want to!
